candidate_check.description: Microsoft Defender AV must enable behavior monitoring.

check_content_excerpt: Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Turn on behavior monitoring is set to "Enabled"; otherwise, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Turn on behavior monitoring to "Enabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must enable behavior monitoring.
